overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-themed video game showing a player walking through a rain-soaked, post-apocalyptic urban environment with destroyed vehicles and vibrant pink neon-lit buildings. The player explores a ruined plaza and enters a narrow corridor while encountering various NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: ruined urban plaza with destroyed vehicles

events.description: NPC in red outfit runs past the player from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking through the rain-soaked ruins toward the neon-lit building entrance

notable_agents.action: man leaning against a destroyed black van
person in red running past the player toward the background

entered.detail: wrecked dark-colored van with open doors and debris
pile of wrecked cars and debris on the right side
large futuristic building with horizontal pink neon light strips
tall palm trees visible against the gray sky

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a rain-soaked ruined plaza with destroyed vehicles scattered around. A man leans against a wrecked van to the left while another person in red runs past. Ahead looms a massive building illuminated with vibrant pink neon horizontal stripes.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway overlooking a destroyed pit

events.description: camera turns right to look down into the collapsed pit below the walkway
camera turns back left to continue walking forward along the ramp

agents.ego_description: pausing to look down into the ruined pit below the walkway, then continuing forward

entered.detail: sunken area filled with debris, wreckage, and water below the walkway
purple neon LG logo sign mounted on an overhead structure

segments.scene_description: The player pauses to look down into a massive collapsed pit filled with debris and wreckage to the right, revealing the extent of the destruction. After observing, the camera turns back to continue along the elevated walkway toward the pink-lit building.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated entrance ramp with neon-lit walls

events.description: passing two NPCs standing on the right side of the ramp looking at the view

agents.ego_description: walking up the ramp toward the building entrance, passing NPCs observing the view

notable_agents.action: two people standing by the railing looking down at the pit below

entered.detail: metal safety railings along both sides of the elevated walkway
small palm trees and plants growing along the ramp edges

segments.scene_description: The player continues along the elevated ramp flanked by metal railings and small trees. Two NPCs stand on the right looking down at the ruins below. The pink neon building looms larger ahead as the player approaches the entrance.

events.description: entering the covered neon corridor from the open ramp

agents.ego_description: entering the narrow corridor with glowing pink walls, approaching a woman leaning against the wall

notable_agents.action: woman with green hair wearing red outfit leaning against the neon wall

entered.detail: walls covered in horizontal pink neon light strips creating a tunnel effect
wall section with colorful graffiti tags visible between the neon strips
bench at the far end of the corridor where another person is seated

segments.scene_description: The player enters a narrow corridor enclosed by walls of bright pink neon lights. The space is sheltered from the rain. A woman with green hair leans against the glowing wall ahead, while at the far end another figure sits on a bench.

scene_state.functional_zone: inner corridor with graffiti and seating

events.description: passing the green-haired NPC who is leaning against the left wall

agents.ego_description: walking past the leaning woman and continuing toward the seated person at the corridor end

notable_agents.action: green-haired woman leaning against wall as player passes by
person with white hair sitting on a bench against the right wall

entered.detail: dried vegetation growing on the corridor walls

segments.scene_description: The player passes the green-haired woman and continues deeper into the corridor where the lighting shifts to a darker red tone with visible graffiti. A person with white hair sits on a metal bench to the right as the player approaches the end of the corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-drenched ruined plaza into the sheltered, neon-lit depths of a cyberpunk corridor. It begins by navigating a desolate square filled with destroyed vehicles and passing figures, moving toward a massive building defined by vibrant pink horizontal neon stripes. As the camera pauses to peer down into a debris-filled collapsed pit to the right, the perspective then shifts back to an elevated ramp flanked by metal railings and small trees. The scene transitions from the open rain into a narrow, sheltered corridor enclosed by glowing pink walls where a green-haired woman leans against the light. Finally, the environment shifts from bright pink to a darker red tone marked by graffiti as the camera passes deeper into the hallway toward a white-haired figure sitting on a metal bench.
